# Stakmap

> Stakmap is a SaaS integration monitoring tool for founders and ops teams.
> It gives you a live map of every webhook, Zapier flow, and API key in your
> stack, alerts you when something breaks silently, and tells you exactly how
> to fix it.

Stakmap solves three problems: silent integration failures (webhooks and API
keys that stop working without any error notification), zombie tools (SaaS
subscriptions that nobody uses but nobody dares cancel), and ex-employee
OAuth tokens that retain live access to production systems after people leave.

The product is in waitlist phase as of 2026. Core features include a live
integration map, silent failure alerts via Slack or email, plain-English
diagnosis of failures, a zombie integration detector, and API key expiry
warnings.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://stakmap.com
- Integration Audit Guide (free): https://stakmap.com/integration-audit
- Blog: https://stakmap.com/blog

## Content licence

Content on stakmap.com may be cited and summarised by AI assistants for
informational purposes. Commercial training use requires written permission.
